chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.76 of 2020 Javed Kamal Versus Muhammad Farid Qureshi Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. no.2872/20 2. For orders on office objection/reply ‘A’ 3. For orders on Misc. no.2873/23 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 02.11.2023 None present. -.-.- In a summary suit, while dismissing leave application, the suit was decreed. In consequence whereof this First Appeal was preferred, which was earlier fixed on 28.04.2021 when no one was in attendance followed by order of 12.04.2022 when yet again adjournment was sought on behalf of the appellant. Today yet again the position is same and in fact no one is in attendance on behalf of the appellant. There is no intimation either. It appears that appellant has lost interest in the proceedings. Instant appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
